source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH CTE AS (select *, ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by claim_id, claim_line_id ORDER BY CLAIM_FACT_KEY DESC) AS RN from (
SELECT

    distinct c.CLAIM_HCC_ID                                              AS claim_id,
    l.CLAIM_LINE_HCC_ID                                         AS claim_line_id,
        c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY                                            AS CLAIM_FACT_KEY,

    'claim'                                                     AS claim_use,
    CAST('true' AS VARCHAR(5))                                  AS insurance_focal,

    c.CLAIM_TYPE_NAME                                           AS claim_type,
    c.CLAIM_FILING_CODE                                         AS claim_type_code,
    c.TYPE_OF_BILL_CODE                                         AS BILLING_FACILITY_TYPE,
    psc.PAYMENT_STATUS_CODE                                     AS claim_payment_status,

    m.MEMBER_HCC_ID                                             AS local_member_id,
    mem.MEMBER_FIRST_NAME                                       AS first_name,
    mem.MEMBER_LAST_NAME                                        AS last_name,
    m.MEMBER_GENDER_CODE                                        AS gender,
    dd_bd.DATE_NAME_2                                           AS birth_date,

    dd_entry.DATE_NAME_2                                        AS source_record_date,
    dd_receipt.DATE_NAME_2                                      AS claim_submission_date,
    dd_adjud.DATE_NAME_2                                        AS claim_adjudication_date,
    dd_pay.DATE_NAME_2                                          AS claim_payment_date,
    pf.PROCESSING_DATE_TIME                                     AS claim_processing_date,
    dd_stmt_s.DATE_NAME_2                                       AS first_date_of_header_service,
    dd_stmt_e.DATE_NAME_2                                       AS last_date_of_header_service,
    dd_svc_s.DATE_NAME_2                                        AS first_date_of_line_service,
    dd_svc_e.DATE_NAME_2                                        AS last_date_of_line_service,
    c.ADMIT_TIME                                                AS admit_date,
    c.DISCHARGE_TIME                                            AS discharge_date,
    dd_eff.DATE_NAME_2                                          AS active_since_date,
    dd_term.DATE_NAME_2                                         AS active_till_date,

    c.ADMIT_DIAGNOSIS_CODE                                      AS diagnosis,
    clf.SERVICE_CODE                                            AS procedure_code,
    clf.PLACE_OF_SERVICE_CODE                                   AS place_of_service,
    clf_mod.MODIFIER_CODE                                       AS primary_procedure_modifier_code,
    l.REVENUE_CODE                                              AS revenue_center_code,
    esygrp.FAC_FLAG                                             AS claim_facility_type,
    CAST(c.CALCULATED_DRG_KEY AS VARCHAR(20))                   AS drg_code,

    atc.ADMIT_TYPE_CODE                                         AS admission_type,
    atc.ADMIT_TYPE_NAME                                         AS admission_type_name,
    asc_t.ADMIT_SOURCE_CODE                                     AS admit_source_code,
    asc_t.ADMIT_SOURCE_NAME                                     AS admit_source_name,

    bp.BENEFIT_PLAN_HCC_ID                                      AS payer_id,
    bp.BENEFIT_PLAN_NAME                                        AS payer_name,
    bp.BENEFIT_PLAN_HCC_ID                                      AS plan_id,
    bp.BENEFIT_PLAN_NAME                                        AS plan_name,
    bptc.BENEFIT_PLAN_TYPE_DESC                                 AS plan_type,

    c.SUPPLIER_KEY                                              AS servicing_provider_key,
    c.SI_SUPPLIER_NPI                                           AS servicing_provider_npi,
    c.SI_SUPPLIER_TIN                                           AS tax_id,
    sup.SUPPLIER_NAME                                           AS tax_org_name,

    l.SI_ORDERING_PRACT_NPI                                     AS ordering_provider_npi,
    l.ORDERING_PRACTITIONER_KEY                                 AS ordering_provider_key,
    c.ATTENDING_PRACTITIONER_KEY                                AS attending_provider_key,

    SUM(l.BILLED_AMOUNT)            OVER (PARTITION BY c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY) AS total_claim_amount,
    SUM(l.BASE_PAID_AMOUNT)         OVER (PARTITION BY c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY) AS total_insurance_paid_amount,
    SUM(l.BASE_ALLOWED_AMOUNT)      OVER (PARTITION BY c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY) AS allowed_amount_header,
    SUM(fcl.BASE_COPAY_AMOUNT)      OVER (PARTITION BY c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY) AS co_pay,
    SUM(fcl.BASE_COINSURANCE_AMOUNT) OVER (PARTITION BY c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY) AS coinsurance_amount,
    SUM(fcl.BASE_NON_COVERED_AMOUNT) OVER (PARTITION BY c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY) AS noncovered_amount,
    SUM(l.OTHER_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT)    OVER (PARTITION BY c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY) AS discount_amount,
    cpf.PAYABLE_AMOUNT                                          AS BENEFIT_PAYABLE,
    scob.EOB_AMNTS_DISTRIBUTED                                  AS cob_amount,
    scob.DEDUCTIBLE_AMOUNT                                      AS deductible,

    l.BILLED_AMOUNT                                             AS line_claim_amount,
    l.BASE_ALLOWED_AMOUNT                                       AS allowed_amount,
    l.BASE_ALLOWED_AMOUNT                                       AS line_eligible_amount,
    l.BASE_PAID_AMOUNT                                          AS line_insurance_paid_amount,
    l.BASE_PAID_AMOUNT                                          AS line_paidtoprovider_amount,
    l.NET_MEMBER_RESP_AMOUNT                                    AS line_member_paid_amount,
    l.BASE_MEMBER_RESP_AMOUNT                                   AS line_memberliability_amount,
    l.BASE_MEMBER_RESP_AMOUNT                                   AS line_paidbypatient_amount,
    l.OTHER_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT                                     AS line_discount_amount,
    fcl.BASE_COPAY_AMOUNT                                       AS line_co_pay,
    fcl.BASE_COINSURANCE_AMOUNT                                 AS line_coinsurance_pay,
    fcl.BASE_DEDUCTIBLE_AMOUNT                                  AS line_deductible,
    fcl.BASE_NON_COVERED_AMOUNT                                 AS line_noncovered_amount,
    scob.PAID_AMOUNT                                            AS line_cob_paid_amount,
    scob.EOB_AMNTS_DISTRIBUTED                                  AS line_priorpayerpaid_amount,

    acrf.CLAIM_DENY_REASON_ID                                   AS denial_reason_code,
    acrf.CLAIM_DENY_REASON_ID                                   AS line_denial_reason_code,
    l.DENIAL_MSG_CD_KEY                                         AS denial_reason_description_key,

    barc.BILLING_ADJ_REASON_DESC                                AS adjustment_reason,
    aah.ACCOUNT_STATUS                                          AS adjustment_status,

    ptc.PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE                                       AS payee_type,

    bgt.TRANSACTION_ID                                          AS transaction_id

FROM       dbo.ALL_CLAIM_LINE_FACT                                    l

INNER JOIN (select * from dbo.ALL_CLAIM_FACT where CLAIM_TYPE_NAME NOT LIKE '%Dental%' )          c
        ON c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY                      = l.CLAIM_FACT_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.ALL_MEMBER_VERSION_HIST_FACT )          m
        ON m.MEMBER_KEY                     = c.MEMBER_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.MEMBER)                                 mem
        ON mem.MEMBER_KEY                   = c.MEMBER_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.BENEFIT_PLAN_HISTORY_FACT  )            bp
        ON bp.BENEFIT_PLAN_KEY              = l.BENEFIT_PLAN_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.OTHER_INSURANCE_COVERAGE )              oic
        ON oic.MEMBER_KEY                   = c.MEMBER_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.BENEFIT_PLAN_TYPE_CODE )                bptc
        ON bptc.BENEFIT_PLAN_TYPE_KEY       = oic.BENEFIT_PLAN_TYPE_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.CLAIM_ADMIT_TYPE_CODE )                 atc
        ON atc.ADMIT_TYPE_KEY               = c.ADMIT_TYPE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.CLAIM_ADMIT_SOURCE_CODE )               asc_t
        ON asc_t.ADMIT_SOURCE_KEY           = c.ADMIT_SOURCE_KEY

LEFT  JOIN dbo.SUPPLIER                                               sup
        ON sup.SUPPLIER_KEY                 = c.SUPPLIER_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.CLAIM_LINE_FACT )                       clf
        ON clf.CLAIM_LINE_FACT_KEY          = l.CLAIM_LINE_FACT_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.CLAIM_LINE_FACT_TO_MODIFIER)            clf_mod
        ON clf_mod.CLAIM_LINE_FACT_KEY      = l.CLAIM_LINE_FACT_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.FINAL_CLAIM_LINE_FACT )                 fcl
        ON fcl.CLAIM_LINE_FACT_KEY          = l.CLAIM_LINE_FACT_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (
    SELECT * FROM (
        SELECT *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PAYMENT_FACT_KEY ORDER BY PAYMENT_DATE_KEY DESC) AS rn_pk,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY MEMBER_KEY       ORDER BY PAYMENT_DATE_KEY DESC) AS rn_mem
        FROM dbo.PAYMENT_FACT
    ) pf_inner
    WHERE rn_pk = 1 AND rn_mem = 1
)                                                                      pf
        ON pf.MEMBER_KEY                    = c.MEMBER_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.PAYMENT_STATUS_CODE                                     psc
        ON psc.PAYMENT_STATUS_CODE          = pf.PAYMENT_STATUS_CODE
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE )                      ptc
        ON ptc.PAYMENT_TYPE_KEY             = pf.PAYMENT_TYPE_KEY

LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_entry
        ON dd_entry.DATE_KEY                = c.ENTRY_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_receipt
        ON dd_receipt.DATE_KEY              = c.RECEIPT_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_adjud
        ON dd_adjud.DATE_KEY                = c.MOST_RECENT_PROCESS_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_stmt_s
        ON dd_stmt_s.DATE_KEY               = c.STATEMENT_START_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_stmt_e
        ON dd_stmt_e.DATE_KEY               = c.STATEMENT_END_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_svc_s
        ON dd_svc_s.DATE_KEY                = l.SERVICE_START_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_svc_e
        ON dd_svc_e.DATE_KEY                = l.SERVICE_END_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_bd
        ON dd_bd.DATE_KEY                   = m.MEMBER_BIRTH_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_pay
        ON dd_pay.DATE_KEY                  = pf.PAYMENT_DATE_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.ALL_ACCOUNT_HISTORY_FACT )               aah
        ON aah.ACCOUNT_KEY                  = l.ACCOUNT_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.DATE_DIMENSION )                         dd_eff
        ON dd_eff.DATE_KEY                  = aah.ACCOUNT_EFFECTIVE_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.DATE_DIMENSION )                         dd_term
        ON dd_term.DATE_KEY                 = aah.ACCOUNT_TERMINATION_DATE_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.SUBMITTED_COB_PAYMENT_FACT )             scob
        ON scob.CLAIM_FACT_KEY              = c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.CLAIM_PAYABLE_FACT )                     cpf
        ON cpf.CLAIM_FACT_KEY               = c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY

LEFT  JOIN dbo.ACCOUNT_CLAIM_REVIEW_FACT                               acrf
        ON acrf.ACCOUNT_KEY                 = l.ACCOUNT_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.ALL_BILLING_ADJUSTMENT_FACT )            abaf
        ON abaf.MEMBER_KEY                  = c.MEMBER_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.BILLING_ADJ_REASON_CODE )                barc
        ON barc.BILLING_ADJ_REASON_KEY      = abaf.BILLING_ADJ_REASON_KEY

LEFT  JOIN dbo.ESYGRP_PHYSICIAN_LINE_RES                               esygrp
        ON esygrp.ESYGRP_PHYSICIAN_LINE_RES_KEY = l.ESYGRP_PHYSICIAN_LINE_RES_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.BURGESS_CLM_RES )                        bgt
        ON bgt.BURGESS_CLM_RES_KEY          = c.BURGESS_CLM_RES_KEY
)x
)
SELECT
    claim_id, claim_line_id, CLAIM_FACT_KEY,
    claim_use, insurance_focal,
    claim_type, claim_type_code, BILLING_FACILITY_TYPE, claim_payment_status,
    local_member_id, first_name, last_name, gender, birth_date,
    source_record_date, claim_submission_date, claim_adjudication_date,
    claim_payment_date, claim_processing_date,
    first_date_of_header_service, last_date_of_header_service,
    first_date_of_line_service, last_date_of_line_service,
    admit_date, discharge_date, active_since_date, active_till_date,
    diagnosis, procedure_code, place_of_service,
    primary_procedure_modifier_code, revenue_center_code,
    claim_facility_type, drg_code,
    admission_type, admission_type_name, admit_source_code, admit_source_name,
    payer_id, payer_name, plan_id, plan_name, plan_type,
    servicing_provider_key, servicing_provider_npi,
    tax_id, tax_org_name, ordering_provider_npi,
    ordering_provider_key, attending_provider_key,
    total_claim_amount, total_insurance_paid_amount, allowed_amount_header,
    co_pay, coinsurance_amount, noncovered_amount, discount_amount,
    BENEFIT_PAYABLE, cob_amount, deductible,
    line_claim_amount, allowed_amount, line_eligible_amount,
    line_insurance_paid_amount, line_paidtoprovider_amount,
    line_member_paid_amount, line_memberliability_amount,
    line_paidbypatient_amount, line_discount_amount,
    line_co_pay, line_coinsurance_pay, line_deductible,
    line_noncovered_amount, line_cob_paid_amount, line_priorpayerpaid_amount,
    denial_reason_code, line_denial_reason_code, denial_reason_description_key,
    adjustment_reason, adjustment_status, payee_type, transaction_id
FROM CTE
WHERE RN = 1

SELECT last_load_datetime
FROM dbo.pipeline_run_log
WHERE pipeline_name = 'PL_Incremental_MedicalClaims'

sqlReaderQuery.value:
WITH CTE AS (select *, ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by claim_id, claim_line_id ORDER BY CLAIM_FACT_KEY DESC) AS RN from (
SELECT

    distinct c.CLAIM_HCC_ID                                              AS claim_id,
    l.CLAIM_LINE_HCC_ID                                         AS claim_line_id,
        c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY                                            AS CLAIM_FACT_KEY,

    'claim'                                                     AS claim_use,
    CAST('true' AS VARCHAR(5))                                  AS insurance_focal,

    c.CLAIM_TYPE_NAME                                           AS claim_type,
    c.CLAIM_FILING_CODE                                         AS claim_type_code,
    c.TYPE_OF_BILL_CODE                                         AS BILLING_FACILITY_TYPE,
    psc.PAYMENT_STATUS_CODE                                     AS claim_payment_status,

    m.MEMBER_HCC_ID                                             AS local_member_id,
    mem.MEMBER_FIRST_NAME                                       AS first_name,
    mem.MEMBER_LAST_NAME                                        AS last_name,
    m.MEMBER_GENDER_CODE                                        AS gender,
    dd_bd.DATE_NAME_2                                           AS birth_date,

    dd_entry.DATE_NAME_2                                        AS source_record_date,
    dd_receipt.DATE_NAME_2                                      AS claim_submission_date,
    dd_adjud.DATE_NAME_2                                        AS claim_adjudication_date,
    dd_pay.DATE_NAME_2                                          AS claim_payment_date,
    pf.PROCESSING_DATE_TIME                                     AS claim_processing_date,
    dd_stmt_s.DATE_NAME_2                                       AS first_date_of_header_service,
    dd_stmt_e.DATE_NAME_2                                       AS last_date_of_header_service,
    dd_svc_s.DATE_NAME_2                                        AS first_date_of_line_service,
    dd_svc_e.DATE_NAME_2                                        AS last_date_of_line_service,
    c.ADMIT_TIME                                                AS admit_date,
    c.DISCHARGE_TIME                                            AS discharge_date,
    dd_eff.DATE_NAME_2                                          AS active_since_date,
    dd_term.DATE_NAME_2                                         AS active_till_date,

    c.ADMIT_DIAGNOSIS_CODE                                      AS diagnosis,
    clf.SERVICE_CODE                                            AS procedure_code,
    clf.PLACE_OF_SERVICE_CODE                                   AS place_of_service,
    clf_mod.MODIFIER_CODE                                       AS primary_procedure_modifier_code,
    l.REVENUE_CODE                                              AS revenue_center_code,
    esygrp.FAC_FLAG                                             AS claim_facility_type,
    CAST(c.CALCULATED_DRG_KEY AS VARCHAR(20))                   AS drg_code,

    atc.ADMIT_TYPE_CODE                                         AS admission_type,
    atc.ADMIT_TYPE_NAME                                         AS admission_type_name,
    asc_t.ADMIT_SOURCE_CODE                                     AS admit_source_code,
    asc_t.ADMIT_SOURCE_NAME                                     AS admit_source_name,

    bp.BENEFIT_PLAN_HCC_ID                                      AS payer_id,
    bp.BENEFIT_PLAN_NAME                                        AS payer_name,
    bp.BENEFIT_PLAN_HCC_ID                                      AS plan_id,
    bp.BENEFIT_PLAN_NAME                                        AS plan_name,
    bptc.BENEFIT_PLAN_TYPE_DESC                                 AS plan_type,

    c.SUPPLIER_KEY                                              AS servicing_provider_key,
    c.SI_SUPPLIER_NPI                                           AS servicing_provider_npi,
    c.SI_SUPPLIER_TIN                                           AS tax_id,
    sup.SUPPLIER_NAME                                           AS tax_org_name,

    l.SI_ORDERING_PRACT_NPI                                     AS ordering_provider_npi,
    l.ORDERING_PRACTITIONER_KEY                                 AS ordering_provider_key,
    c.ATTENDING_PRACTITIONER_KEY                                AS attending_provider_key,

    SUM(l.BILLED_AMOUNT)            OVER (PARTITION BY c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY) AS total_claim_amount,
    SUM(l.BASE_PAID_AMOUNT)         OVER (PARTITION BY c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY) AS total_insurance_paid_amount,
    SUM(l.BASE_ALLOWED_AMOUNT)      OVER (PARTITION BY c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY) AS allowed_amount_header,
    SUM(fcl.BASE_COPAY_AMOUNT)      OVER (PARTITION BY c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY) AS co_pay,
    SUM(fcl.BASE_COINSURANCE_AMOUNT) OVER (PARTITION BY c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY) AS coinsurance_amount,
    SUM(fcl.BASE_NON_COVERED_AMOUNT) OVER (PARTITION BY c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY) AS noncovered_amount,
    SUM(l.OTHER_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT)    OVER (PARTITION BY c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY) AS discount_amount,
    cpf.PAYABLE_AMOUNT                                          AS BENEFIT_PAYABLE,
    scob.EOB_AMNTS_DISTRIBUTED                                  AS cob_amount,
    scob.DEDUCTIBLE_AMOUNT                                      AS deductible,

    l.BILLED_AMOUNT                                             AS line_claim_amount,
    l.BASE_ALLOWED_AMOUNT                                       AS allowed_amount,
    l.BASE_ALLOWED_AMOUNT                                       AS line_eligible_amount,
    l.BASE_PAID_AMOUNT                                          AS line_insurance_paid_amount,
    l.BASE_PAID_AMOUNT                                          AS line_paidtoprovider_amount,
    l.NET_MEMBER_RESP_AMOUNT                                    AS line_member_paid_amount,
    l.BASE_MEMBER_RESP_AMOUNT                                   AS line_memberliability_amount,
    l.BASE_MEMBER_RESP_AMOUNT                                   AS line_paidbypatient_amount,
    l.OTHER_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT                                     AS line_discount_amount,
    fcl.BASE_COPAY_AMOUNT                                       AS line_co_pay,
    fcl.BASE_COINSURANCE_AMOUNT                                 AS line_coinsurance_pay,
    fcl.BASE_DEDUCTIBLE_AMOUNT                                  AS line_deductible,
    fcl.BASE_NON_COVERED_AMOUNT                                 AS line_noncovered_amount,
    scob.PAID_AMOUNT                                            AS line_cob_paid_amount,
    scob.EOB_AMNTS_DISTRIBUTED                                  AS line_priorpayerpaid_amount,

    acrf.CLAIM_DENY_REASON_ID                                   AS denial_reason_code,
    acrf.CLAIM_DENY_REASON_ID                                   AS line_denial_reason_code,
    l.DENIAL_MSG_CD_KEY                                         AS denial_reason_description_key,

    barc.BILLING_ADJ_REASON_DESC                                AS adjustment_reason,
    aah.ACCOUNT_STATUS                                          AS adjustment_status,

    ptc.PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE                                       AS payee_type,

    bgt.TRANSACTION_ID                                          AS transaction_id

FROM       dbo.ALL_CLAIM_LINE_FACT                                    l

INNER JOIN (select * from dbo.ALL_CLAIM_FACT where CLAIM_TYPE_NAME NOT LIKE '%Dental%' )          c
        ON c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY                      = l.CLAIM_FACT_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.ALL_MEMBER_VERSION_HIST_FACT )          m
        ON m.MEMBER_KEY                     = c.MEMBER_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.MEMBER)                                 mem
        ON mem.MEMBER_KEY                   = c.MEMBER_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.BENEFIT_PLAN_HISTORY_FACT  )            bp
        ON bp.BENEFIT_PLAN_KEY              = l.BENEFIT_PLAN_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.OTHER_INSURANCE_COVERAGE )              oic
        ON oic.MEMBER_KEY                   = c.MEMBER_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.BENEFIT_PLAN_TYPE_CODE )                bptc
        ON bptc.BENEFIT_PLAN_TYPE_KEY       = oic.BENEFIT_PLAN_TYPE_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.CLAIM_ADMIT_TYPE_CODE )                 atc
        ON atc.ADMIT_TYPE_KEY               = c.ADMIT_TYPE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.CLAIM_ADMIT_SOURCE_CODE )               asc_t
        ON asc_t.ADMIT_SOURCE_KEY           = c.ADMIT_SOURCE_KEY

LEFT  JOIN dbo.SUPPLIER                                               sup
        ON sup.SUPPLIER_KEY                 = c.SUPPLIER_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.CLAIM_LINE_FACT )                       clf
        ON clf.CLAIM_LINE_FACT_KEY          = l.CLAIM_LINE_FACT_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.CLAIM_LINE_FACT_TO_MODIFIER)            clf_mod
        ON clf_mod.CLAIM_LINE_FACT_KEY      = l.CLAIM_LINE_FACT_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.FINAL_CLAIM_LINE_FACT )                 fcl
        ON fcl.CLAIM_LINE_FACT_KEY          = l.CLAIM_LINE_FACT_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (
    SELECT * FROM (
        SELECT *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PAYMENT_FACT_KEY ORDER BY PAYMENT_DATE_KEY DESC) AS rn_pk,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY MEMBER_KEY       ORDER BY PAYMENT_DATE_KEY DESC) AS rn_mem
        FROM dbo.PAYMENT_FACT
    ) pf_inner
    WHERE rn_pk = 1 AND rn_mem = 1
)                                                                      pf
        ON pf.MEMBER_KEY                    = c.MEMBER_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.PAYMENT_STATUS_CODE                                     psc
        ON psc.PAYMENT_STATUS_CODE          = pf.PAYMENT_STATUS_CODE
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE )                      ptc
        ON ptc.PAYMENT_TYPE_KEY             = pf.PAYMENT_TYPE_KEY

LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_entry
        ON dd_entry.DATE_KEY                = c.ENTRY_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_receipt
        ON dd_receipt.DATE_KEY              = c.RECEIPT_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_adjud
        ON dd_adjud.DATE_KEY                = c.MOST_RECENT_PROCESS_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_stmt_s
        ON dd_stmt_s.DATE_KEY               = c.STATEMENT_START_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_stmt_e
        ON dd_stmt_e.DATE_KEY               = c.STATEMENT_END_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_svc_s
        ON dd_svc_s.DATE_KEY                = l.SERVICE_START_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_svc_e
        ON dd_svc_e.DATE_KEY                = l.SERVICE_END_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_bd
        ON dd_bd.DATE_KEY                   = m.MEMBER_BIRTH_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN dbo.DATE_DIMENSION                                          dd_pay
        ON dd_pay.DATE_KEY                  = pf.PAYMENT_DATE_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.ALL_ACCOUNT_HISTORY_FACT )               aah
        ON aah.ACCOUNT_KEY                  = l.ACCOUNT_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.DATE_DIMENSION )                         dd_eff
        ON dd_eff.DATE_KEY                  = aah.ACCOUNT_EFFECTIVE_DATE_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.DATE_DIMENSION )                         dd_term
        ON dd_term.DATE_KEY                 = aah.ACCOUNT_TERMINATION_DATE_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.SUBMITTED_COB_PAYMENT_FACT )             scob
        ON scob.CLAIM_FACT_KEY              = c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.CLAIM_PAYABLE_FACT )                     cpf
        ON cpf.CLAIM_FACT_KEY               = c.CLAIM_FACT_KEY

LEFT  JOIN dbo.ACCOUNT_CLAIM_REVIEW_FACT                               acrf
        ON acrf.ACCOUNT_KEY                 = l.ACCOUNT_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.ALL_BILLING_ADJUSTMENT_FACT )            abaf
        ON abaf.MEMBER_KEY                  = c.MEMBER_KEY
LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.BILLING_ADJ_REASON_CODE )                barc
        ON barc.BILLING_ADJ_REASON_KEY      = abaf.BILLING_ADJ_REASON_KEY

LEFT  JOIN dbo.ESYGRP_PHYSICIAN_LINE_RES                               esygrp
        ON esygrp.ESYGRP_PHYSICIAN_LINE_RES_KEY = l.ESYGRP_PHYSICIAN_LINE_RES_KEY

LEFT  JOIN (select * from dbo.BURGESS_CLM_RES )                        bgt
        ON bgt.BURGESS_CLM_RES_KEY          = c.BURGESS_CLM_RES_KEY
)x
)
SELECT
    claim_id, claim_line_id, CLAIM_FACT_KEY,
    claim_use, insurance_focal,
    claim_type, claim_type_code, BILLING_FACILITY_TYPE, claim_payment_status,
    local_member_id, first_name, last_name, gender, birth_date,
    source_record_date, claim_submission_date, claim_adjudication_date,
    claim_payment_date, claim_processing_date,
    first_date_of_header_service, last_date_of_header_service,
    first_date_of_line_service, last_date_of_line_service,
    admit_date, discharge_date, active_since_date, active_till_date,
    diagnosis, procedure_code, place_of_service,
    primary_procedure_modifier_code, revenue_center_code,
    claim_facility_type, drg_code,
    admission_type, admission_type_name, admit_source_code, admit_source_name,
    payer_id, payer_name, plan_id, plan_name, plan_type,
    servicing_provider_key, servicing_provider_npi,
    tax_id, tax_org_name, ordering_provider_npi,
    ordering_provider_key, attending_provider_key,
    total_claim_amount, total_insurance_paid_amount, allowed_amount_header,
    co_pay, coinsurance_amount, noncovered_amount, discount_amount,
    BENEFIT_PAYABLE, cob_amount, deductible,
    line_claim_amount, allowed_amount, line_eligible_amount,
    line_insurance_paid_amount, line_paidtoprovider_amount,
    line_member_paid_amount, line_memberliability_amount,
    line_paidbypatient_amount, line_discount_amount,
    line_co_pay, line_coinsurance_pay, line_deductible,
    line_noncovered_amount, line_cob_paid_amount, line_priorpayerpaid_amount,
    denial_reason_code, line_denial_reason_code, denial_reason_description_key,
    adjustment_reason, adjustment_status, payee_type, transaction_id
FROM CTE
WHERE RN = 1
  AND (source_record_date IS NULL OR CAST(source_record_date AS DATE) >= CAST((
    SELECT last_load_datetime
    FROM   dbo.pipeline_run_log
    WHERE  pipeline_name = 'PL_Incremental_MedicalClaims'
) AS DATE))

scripts.text:
/* ================================================================
   INCREMENTAL MERGE — dbo.medical_claims_staging → dbo.medical_claims
   Used in ADF as Activity 4 (Script / NonQuery)
   ================================================================
   WHEN MATCHED          → UPDATE (claim exists, data changed)
   WHEN NOT MATCHED      → INSERT (new claim not yet in target)
   NOTE: No DELETE — incremental load only processes changed/new
         records. Use full MERGE (merge_medical_claims.sql) if
         DELETE of removed claims is also required.
   ================================================================ */

MERGE dbo.medical_claims AS target
USING dbo.medical_claims_staging AS source
    ON  target.claim_id      = source.claim_id
    AND target.claim_line_id = source.claim_line_id

WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
    target.CLAIM_FACT_KEY                  = source.CLAIM_FACT_KEY,
    target.claim_use                       = source.claim_use,
    target.insurance_focal                 = source.insurance_focal,
    target.claim_type                      = source.claim_type,
    target.claim_type_code                 = source.claim_type_code,
    target.BILLING_FACILITY_TYPE           = source.BILLING_FACILITY_TYPE,
    target.claim_payment_status            = source.claim_payment_status,
    target.local_member_id                 = source.local_member_id,
    target.first_name                      = source.first_name,
    target.last_name                       = source.last_name,
    target.gender                          = source.gender,
    target.birth_date                      = source.birth_date,
    target.source_record_date              = source.source_record_date,
    target.claim_submission_date           = source.claim_submission_date,
    target.claim_adjudication_date         = source.claim_adjudication_date,
    target.claim_payment_date              = source.claim_payment_date,
    target.claim_processing_date           = source.claim_processing_date,
    target.first_date_of_header_service    = source.first_date_of_header_service,
    target.last_date_of_header_service     = source.last_date_of_header_service,
    target.first_date_of_line_service      = source.first_date_of_line_service,
    target.last_date_of_line_service       = source.last_date_of_line_service,
    target.admit_date                      = source.admit_date,
    target.discharge_date                  = source.discharge_date,
    target.active_since_date               = source.active_since_date,
    target.active_till_date                = source.active_till_date,
    target.diagnosis                       = source.diagnosis,
    target.procedure_code                  = source.procedure_code,
    target.place_of_service                = source.place_of_service,
    target.primary_procedure_modifier_code = source.primary_procedure_modifier_code,
    target.revenue_center_code             = source.revenue_center_code,
    target.claim_facility_type             = source.claim_facility_type,
    target.drg_code                        = source.drg_code,
    target.admission_type                  = source.admission_type,
    target.admission_type_name             = source.admission_type_name,
    target.admit_source_code               = source.admit_source_code,
    target.admit_source_name               = source.admit_source_name,
    target.payer_id                        = source.payer_id,
    target.payer_name                      = source.payer_name,
    target.plan_id                         = source.plan_id,
    target.plan_name                       = source.plan_name,
    target.plan_type                       = source.plan_type,
    target.servicing_provider_key          = source.servicing_provider_key,
    target.servicing_provider_npi          = source.servicing_provider_npi,
    target.tax_id                          = source.tax_id,
    target.tax_org_name                    = source.tax_org_name,
    target.ordering_provider_npi           = source.ordering_provider_npi,
    target.ordering_provider_key           = source.ordering_provider_key,
    target.attending_provider_key          = source.attending_provider_key,
    target.total_claim_amount              = source.total_claim_amount,
    target.total_insurance_paid_amount     = source.total_insurance_paid_amount,
    target.allowed_amount_header           = source.allowed_amount_header,
    target.co_pay                          = source.co_pay,
    target.coinsurance_amount              = source.coinsurance_amount,
    target.noncovered_amount               = source.noncovered_amount,
    target.discount_amount                 = source.discount_amount,
    target.BENEFIT_PAYABLE                 = source.BENEFIT_PAYABLE,
    target.cob_amount                      = source.cob_amount,
    target.deductible                      = source.deductible,
    target.line_claim_amount               = source.line_claim_amount,
    target.allowed_amount                  = source.allowed_amount,
    target.line_eligible_amount            = source.line_eligible_amount,
    target.line_insurance_paid_amount      = source.line_insurance_paid_amount,
    target.line_paidtoprovider_amount      = source.line_paidtoprovider_amount,
    target.line_member_paid_amount         = source.line_member_paid_amount,
    target.line_memberliability_amount     = source.line_memberliability_amount,
    target.line_paidbypatient_amount       = source.line_paidbypatient_amount,
    target.line_discount_amount            = source.line_discount_amount,
    target.line_co_pay                     = source.line_co_pay,
    target.line_coinsurance_pay            = source.line_coinsurance_pay,
    target.line_deductible                 = source.line_deductible,
    target.line_noncovered_amount          = source.line_noncovered_amount,
    target.line_cob_paid_amount            = source.line_cob_paid_amount,
    target.line_priorpayerpaid_amount      = source.line_priorpayerpaid_amount,
    target.denial_reason_code              = source.denial_reason_code,
    target.line_denial_reason_code         = source.line_denial_reason_code,
    target.denial_reason_description_key   = source.denial_reason_description_key,
    target.adjustment_reason               = source.adjustment_reason,
    target.adjustment_status               = source.adjustment_status,
    target.payee_type                      = source.payee_type,
    target.transaction_id                  = source.transaction_id,
    target.adf_load_datetime               = GETUTCDATE()

WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT (
    claim_id, claim_line_id, CLAIM_FACT_KEY,
    claim_use, insurance_focal, claim_type, claim_type_code,
    BILLING_FACILITY_TYPE, claim_payment_status,
    local_member_id, first_name, last_name, gender, birth_date,
    source_record_date, claim_submission_date, claim_adjudication_date,
    claim_payment_date, claim_processing_date,
    first_date_of_header_service, last_date_of_header_service,
    first_date_of_line_service, last_date_of_line_service,
    admit_date, discharge_date, active_since_date, active_till_date,
    diagnosis, procedure_code, place_of_service,
    primary_procedure_modifier_code, revenue_center_code,
    claim_facility_type, drg_code,
    admission_type, admission_type_name, admit_source_code, admit_source_name,
    payer_id, payer_name, plan_id, plan_name, plan_type,
    servicing_provider_key, servicing_provider_npi,
    tax_id, tax_org_name, ordering_provider_npi,
    ordering_provider_key, attending_provider_key,
    total_claim_amount, total_insurance_paid_amount, allowed_amount_header,
    co_pay, coinsurance_amount, noncovered_amount, discount_amount,
    BENEFIT_PAYABLE, cob_amount, deductible,
    line_claim_amount, allowed_amount, line_eligible_amount,
    line_insurance_paid_amount, line_paidtoprovider_amount,
    line_member_paid_amount, line_memberliability_amount,
    line_paidbypatient_amount, line_discount_amount,
    line_co_pay, line_coinsurance_pay, line_deductible,
    line_noncovered_amount, line_cob_paid_amount, line_priorpayerpaid_amount,
    denial_reason_code, line_denial_reason_code, denial_reason_description_key,
    adjustment_reason, adjustment_status, payee_type, transaction_id,
    adf_load_datetime
) VALUES (
    source.claim_id, source.claim_line_id, source.CLAIM_FACT_KEY,
    source.claim_use, source.insurance_focal, source.claim_type, source.claim_type_code,
    source.BILLING_FACILITY_TYPE, source.claim_payment_status,
    source.local_member_id, source.first_name, source.last_name, source.gender, source.birth_date,
    source.source_record_date, source.claim_submission_date, source.claim_adjudication_date,
    source.claim_payment_date, source.claim_processing_date,
    source.first_date_of_header_service, source.last_date_of_header_service,
    source.first_date_of_line_service, source.last_date_of_line_service,
    source.admit_date, source.discharge_date, source.active_since_date, source.active_till_date,
    source.diagnosis, source.procedure_code, source.place_of_service,
    source.primary_procedure_modifier_code, source.revenue_center_code,
    source.claim_facility_type, source.drg_code,
    source.admission_type, source.admission_type_name, source.admit_source_code, source.admit_source_name,
    source.payer_id, source.payer_name, source.plan_id, source.plan_name, source.plan_type,
    source.servicing_provider_key, source.servicing_provider_npi,
    source.tax_id, source.tax_org_name, source.ordering_provider_npi,
    source.ordering_provider_key, source.attending_provider_key,
    source.total_claim_amount, source.total_insurance_paid_amount, source.allowed_amount_header,
    source.co_pay, source.coinsurance_amount, source.noncovered_amount, source.discount_amount,
    source.BENEFIT_PAYABLE, source.cob_amount, source.deductible,
    source.line_claim_amount, source.allowed_amount, source.line_eligible_amount,
    source.line_insurance_paid_amount, source.line_paidtoprovider_amount,
    source.line_member_paid_amount, source.line_memberliability_amount,
    source.line_paidbypatient_amount, source.line_discount_amount,
    source.line_co_pay, source.line_coinsurance_pay, source.line_deductible,
    source.line_noncovered_amount, source.line_cob_paid_amount, source.line_priorpayerpaid_amount,
    source.denial_reason_code, source.line_denial_reason_code, source.denial_reason_description_key,
    source.adjustment_reason, source.adjustment_status, source.payee_type, source.transaction_id,
    GETUTCDATE()
);
